attempts.last_message_excerpt: {"title":"precision-scientific-calculator","summary":"Start by scaffolding a React + Tauri + TypeScript calculator shell and freezing the shared computation, settings, and persistence contracts so feature work can proceed safely in parallel. Then build three independent slices in parallel: the product shell with persisted settings/history/memory, the expression and precision engine for calculation mode, and the matrix engine with its own UI.
